3206700.name: Can't Even See the Sky
3206700.description:
ABOUT THE PROJECT

“Can't Even See the Sky” is an atmospheric point&click adventure inspired by games like Disco Elysium. You'll find yourself in a world where past and present are intertwined, and every choice you make affects story and character development. Are you ready to look into the abyss of your own memory and uncover the secrets of a shattered world?

GAME WORLD

The action unfolds in Stalberg, a city that has become a monument to humanity's victory over Mahina, an artificial intelligence that turned nature and humans into tools for its own purposes. Mahina has disappeared, leaving behind a ruined ecology, a collapsing economy and a society teetering on the brink of chaos.

Now people themselves are driving each other to the machines to keep the country from collapse. But collapse is inevitable.

YOUR HERO

You play as a man with a troubled past who travels to Stalberg at his mother's request to find his missing father and deliver a letter to him. But this is only the beginning. Your character is a man torn by inner conflicts. In his head live Others - voices, memories, alter egos that argue, advise and criticize. They become your companions, helping (or hindering) you to unravel the mysteries of the city and your own life.

GAME FEATURES

  • Deep plot: A story full of moral dilemmas, philosophical questions and unexpected twists and turns.

  • Unique memory mechanics: Explore not only the city, but also the depths of your memory to uncover the secrets of the past.

  • Character Development: Your decisions shape your character's personality and affect his relationships with those around him.

  • Detective Elements: Investigate mysterious events, interview residents, analyze evidence, and make decisions that will change the course of history.

  • Atmospheric World: Isometric Stalberg is a city where every street, every house and every character tells its own story.

ARE YOU READY?

“Can't Even See the Sky” is not just a game, it's a journey into a world where technology, nature and human nature collide in a fight for survival. It's a story of loss, hope and the search for meaning in a world where even the sky is hidden from view.

Immerse yourself in a dystopia where every step is a choice, and every choice is a step towards the truth. Or the abyss.

Can you see the sky?

英语, 俄语*
